payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Close-up partial crop of a dark, glossy rounded side table edge with a smooth reflective lacquered or plastic finish, visible vertical seam/ridge and light scuffs; edge-cropped in frame and appears approximately 0.5 m from the camera.
